plugins.name: codexis
plugins.description: CODEXIS legal database API access for Czech, Slovak, and EU legislation, case law, legal literature, and contract templates

plugins.name: visualization
plugins.description: D3.js-based data visualization for legal/law data - graphs, timelines, trees, charts, calendars, flowcharts, grids, kanban boards, and maps

plugins.name: katastr
plugins.description: Katastr nemovitostí ČR - property registry lookup and cadastral data access

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Playwright MCP (fork) configured with --no-sandbox for Chromium under bwrap.

plugins.name: ocr
plugins.description: Document to Markdown conversion via OCR — supports PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, images, and ZIP archives

plugins.name: video-analyze
plugins.description: Video content analysis using Gemini — supports YouTube URLs and local video files
